alignment.sign_convention: parallel = dot(unit_reach_direction, vector); lateral = cross(unit_reach_direction, vector)
alignment.target_time_convention: static_target_known_immediately; current local response-map bank repeats the first validation target for stochastic histories

candidate_observation_basis.sign_convention: candidate feedback is [target_x - delayed_x, target_y - delayed_y, -delayed_vx, -delayed_vy]; analytical reference input derivatives are therefore multiplied by -1 before comparison

evaluation_metadata.noise: feedbax Channel noise disabled; plant-process force noise disabled if present
